title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Burberry International Limited
body: "Application number 5018  Applicant Burberry Limited objected to the name used by Burberry International Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 11 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Burberry International Limited is changed to 15780191, LTD. "
